title: Feature Branch Release Flow
steps:
1. Create branch from main: git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name
2. Develop and run local tests
3. Pull changes from origin main: git pull --rebase origin main
4. Push branch: git push origin feature/your-feature-name
5. Open PR on GitHub and await reviews
6. Merge using 'Squash and Merge' method

title: Registering a New Service Module
steps:
1. Create folder under modules/ directory
2. Initialize index.html, app.js and link the common styles.css
3. Add physical db.json database file in the module folder
4. Register the module in index.html dock menu list
5. Implement GET /api/module and POST /api/module inside server.js
